open_questions: OnTick ordering fixed per 2026-07-02 audit binding: news_allows check moved below ExitSignal loop. SPEC.md rewritten from incomplete stub to full 7-section validator format. Recompiled 2026-07-05.
iClose calls at bar shifts 1 and 2 in Strategy_EntrySignal annotated // perf-allowed: closed-bar EMA cross detection, called after QM_IsNewBar gate.

Prior build generated H1 setfiles; card specifies M15/M30. M15 setfiles generated and listed first; H1 setfiles preserved for backward compat. Q02 phase runner should use M15 setfiles per card spec. ATR thresholds (strategy_long_atr_points_max=20, strategy_short_atr_points_min=25) are expressed in price POINTS — they will need per-symbol calibration in P3 since 20 points is meaningful for EURUSD but tiny for NDX/GDAXI. Default values will likely produce very few or no trades on index CFDs; P3 sweep must adjust.

Session defaults use broker-time windows embedded in code (GDAXI: 10:00-18:30, US indices: 16:30-23:00, FX/gold: 09:00-17:30). These are DST-aware via TimeCurrent() (broker time) but use a fixed GMT+2/+3 DXZ mapping; setfile overrides available if DST offset changes.
